emails.subject: Re: CA legislature
emails.body: Re: CA legislature You're a star. I owe ya. Next time you're in town, let me know in advance. Maybe we can have lunch or something. Hope all is well. Best, Jeff

emails.subject: Re: CA legislature

emails.subject: Re: CA legislature
emails.body: Re: CA legislature my last trip was planned a day in advance. I promise to give you more notice next time. I expect I'll be in CA a LOT next year with all the activity going on out there. You'll have a chance to buy me at least one meal.
